commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a5abc52f86a8827da18ec0302ebe8b0690e8f72a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes heartbeat task parsing to test task-block indentation against raw source lines, adds regression coverage for unknown indented fields and block boundaries, and adds a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +45, Docs +1. Total +46 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main trims each line and then checks the trimmed value for leading whitespace, so an unknown indented field ends the task block. The PR discussion also provides terminal before/after proof on the shipped parser with this patch shape applied.
commands.review_followup: - The parser/test change is ready for maintainer review; the remaining issue is release-owned changelog handling rather than a core code repair lane.

target.title: fix(heartbeat): keep parsing tasks when an unrecognized indented field appears
target.author: bsg2000
